---
title: "Performance and Metrics"
description: "In this section I share my ongoing projects and resources related to Health Index and Performance Metrics"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
page-navigation: true
back-to-top-navigation: true
---
